# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->  (or "N/A")

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Chore / refactor

## Testing done

Describe how you tested this change (commands run, manual steps, environments).

```
# e.g.
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm run test
```

## Screenshots (if UI)

Add before/after screenshots for any user-facing change.

## Security considerations

- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, keys, tokens, or transcripts are committed.
- [ ] External input is validated; AI output is schema-validated before use.
- [ ] No new path exposes credentials to the client or logs sensitive data.
- [ ] N/A — this change has no security impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds locally (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Types pass (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Follows the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
